generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how critical it is to reduce dependency on foreign tech for our defense systems. The data is clear: nations with strong strategic autonomy in critical tech maintain 30% more operational flexibility during crises. This isn't about isolation—it's about ensuring our military can operate when global supply chains fail. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
